description: Unknown values propagate into live logic because a powered-down domain's outputs were not isolated.
body: Failure mode: a domain is gated off but its outputs feed the always-on side without isolation cells, so floating values drive the live logic. Detection signals: X propagation appearing in power-aware simulation when the domain powers down, glitches on the always-on side during the gated window, and a missing isolation strategy in the power-intent file. Do not power-gate while outputs reach live logic unisolated. Safer fallback: insert isolation cells to clamp the outputs to a safe value during power-down and re-run power-aware simulation.
